MODULE: cosmos.integration.x402.client
FILE: cosmos/integration/x402/client.py (235 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: x402 Payment Client.

Uses Bankr x402 SDK for automatic micropayments when calling paid APIs.
Cost: $0.01 USDC per request on Base network.

CLASSES:
- PaymentRecord: Record of a payment made.
- SpendingTracker: Track daily spending to enforce limits.
  Methods: def add_payment(self, amount: Decimal)
  Methods: def can_spend(self, amount: Decimal, limit: Decimal) -> bool
- X402Client: HTTP client with automatic x402 payment handling.

When a request returns 402 Pa
  Methods: async def close(self)
  Methods: async def request(self, method: str, url: str, auto_pay: bool=True, **kwargs) -> httpx.Response
  Methods: async def get(self, url: str, **kwargs) -> httpx.Response
  Methods: async def post(self, url: str, **kwargs) -> httpx.Response
  Methods: async def get_json(self, url: str, **kwargs) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def post_json(self, url: str, data: Dict, **kwargs) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def get_spending_summary(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
